problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area may resolve Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
